reversi.name: Reversi
reversi.description: Flip your opponent's pieces to claim the board. Most pieces when the board fills wins.
reversi.hint_place: Your turn — click a highlighted square to place
reversi.skipped_yours: You have no valid moves — your turn is skipped
reversi.skipped_opps: {player} has no valid moves — their turn is skipped
reversi.how_to_play:
Dark moves first. Players alternate placing one piece per turn on any highlighted square.
Each placement must flip at least one opponent piece — any straight line (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal) between your new piece and an existing piece of yours flips all opponent pieces in between.
If you have no valid move your turn is skipped; if neither player can move the game ends.
The player with the most pieces when the board is full (or no moves remain) wins.
A tie is possible if both end with 32 pieces.
